chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI IInd Appeal No.104 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.3268/2023 3. For hearing of main case 16.03.2026 None present -------------------------------- None have appeared on behalf of the appellant since the date of institution of this appeal. Neither any attempt was made to list this matter inspite of notices having been served upon the appellant, as per the bailiff’s report today, none are present on behalf of the appellant in Court. No intimation is received. It appears that the appellant has lost interest in pursuing this appeal which is dismissed for non-prosecution, even otherwise the impugned order has remanded the case to the trial Court with direction to decide the case after giving opportunity to defendants No.2, 5 and to file written statement and to lead evidence. I do not find any reason to interfere in the impugned order on this score too (See Sher Muhammad and another Vs. Jamadar Ghulam Ghaus, 1983 SCMR 133). JUDGE Asif
